name: Review gates answer reveal behind a JOL confidence rating
description: On a review card the Reveal Answer button is not available until the user rates their confidence (1-5). Selecting a confidence value unlocks the reveal step, proving the gate works rather than just being present.

planSteps.description: Log in with valid credentials and wait for the dashboard to load
Click the Review Cards link in the sidebar

Verify a card question is shown above a confidence prompt asking how confident the user is, with five numbered confidence buttons (1 through 5) presented together in a single horizontal row, and no Reveal Answer button enabled yet
Verify selecting confidence updates the UI to show the chosen rating and now reveals an enabled 'Reveal Answer' button — confirming the confidence selection actually unlocked the next step
